name: Mirana
description: Princess of the Moon, Mirana dedicates herself to the service of Selemene, Goddess of the Moon. She prowls the Nightsilver Woods searching for poachers and uses her celestial powers to protect the luminous lotus.

abilities.name: Celestial Quiver
abilities.description: Infuses the next successful attack with magical attack damage bonus. Grants temporary Celestial Quiver charges upon landing with Leap.

abilities.name: Starstorm
abilities.description: Calls down a meteor wave to damage all enemy units within the radius. The nearest enemy unit to Mirana within the secondary radius will be stuck a second time for a portion of the damage.

abilities.name: Sacred Arrow
abilities.description: Fires a long-range arrow that stuns and damages the first enemy unit it impacts. Applies of Mirana's corresponding ability level when acquired.

abilities.name: Leap
abilities.description: None can fail to recognize Mirana's iconic white beast in the heat of battle.

abilities.name: Moonlight Shadow
abilities.description: The buff additionally and independently grants evasion bonus.
